settings.heading: Ask me anything before you buy.
settings.intro: Every message comes straight to me — not a support team, not a queue. If you want more detail on a guitar before spending real money on it, that's exactly what I'm here for.
settings.response_time: Usually within a few hours, always same day
settings.prompts:
• More photos of a specific area — the back, the neck joint, a mark you spotted
  • A measurement: weight, neck profile, action, fret life
  • Anything in the condition notes you'd like clarified
  • Whether a guitar can legally ship to your country
  • Whether something similar is coming in soon
